function.name: nuro_markets_resolved
function.description: Fetch historical resolved-market data (Polymarket initially, expanding to other prediction-market venues). Returns market question, resolution timestamp, winning side, total volume, top-trader count. Designed for ML training datasets, sentiment-correlation analysis, post-mortem analytics, and backtesting frameworks. Costs 0.001 USDC per call — the cheapest endpoint in the Nuro skill catalog, intentionally priced for high-volume batch usage. Payment handled automatically by x402-fetch / x402-py SDKs.

limit.description: Maximum rows to return. Default 50, hard cap 500.

since.description: ISO-8601 timestamp lower bound. Only markets resolved AT OR AFTER this point are returned. Useful for incremental syncs.

category.description: Optional category filter. Omit for all categories.
